name: Eggplant, Red Pepper & Spinach Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the cubed eggplant with salt. Place in a colander and set aside for 20 to 30 minutes.
2. In a medium pot, heat ghee over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
3. Add ginger, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, turmeric, cayenne, ground cardamom, and salt, one at a time, stirring constantly for about 2 minutes.
4. Rinse the eggplant under cold water. Drain and add to the pot with the remaining ingredients except for spinach, apple juice, and water. Stir well.
5. Add apple juice and water. Cover and simmer over low heat for 10 to 15 minutes.
6. In a separate pot, cook the spinach in a small amount of water until it becomes limp but remains bright green. Drain and cool before chopping.
7. Add bell peppers to the eggplant mixture. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Stir in chopped spinach, lemon juice, and extra salt if needed. Simmer for 2 to 3 more minutes.
9. Serve over rice topped with toasted cashew nuts.
